name: The Hateful Accuser
implicitMods: Bleeding cannot be inflicted on you
flavourText: In truth, they point the finger at themselves.

name: Azadi Crest
explicitMods:
Your Lucky or Unlucky effects use the best or
worst from three rolls instead of two
flavourText: "Keita expects an assassination attempt by stealth or subterfuge.
I say we attack head-on, like madmen. Let the fates decide."
- Azadi, first ancestor of the House Azadin

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports spell skills that hit enemies and have no reservation. Cannot support brand skills, orb skills, channelling skills, arcane skills, Vaal skills or skills used by traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods: Supported Skills deal 10% increased Spell Damage
Supported Spells Sacrifice a random nearby Damageable Minion on Cast to gain added Physical Damage equal to 2.8% of Sacrificed Minion's Life
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: Immortality could grant Catarina the time necessary to shape
a better world... but building requires sacrifice, and the useless
would be crushed into the foundation of her new utopia.

descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Mageblood
explicitMods: Magic Utility Flasks cannot be Used
Leftmost 4 Magic Utility Flasks constantly apply their Flask Effects to you
Magic Utility Flask Effects cannot be removed
flavourText: Rivers of power course through your veins.

craftedMods: 15% of Damage Taken from Hits is Leeched as Life during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Svalinn
explicitMods: -10% to maximum Chance to Block Attack Damage
-10% to maximum Chance to Block Spell Damage
Trigger a Socketed Elemental Spell on Block, with a 0.25 second Cooldown
flavourText: The priests found the Great Shield the night it fell to Middengard,
but it was the smiths who delved into the secrets it held.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants armour to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain 1077 additional Armour
You and nearby allies gain 50% more Armour
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports aura skills that reserve life or mana to create auras around you.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 24% increased Aura effect

Supported Skills also count as Blessing Skills
You can only have one Aura on you from your Blessing Skills
Your Non-Blessing Skills which Reserve Mana are Disabled while you have an Aura from a Supported Skill on you
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Spell, AoE, Duration, Fire, Physical, Guard

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff that adds to your armour, and can take some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. When the buff expires or is depleted, the skill deals reflected damage to enemies around you based on the total damage that was taken from the buff. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods: This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect

75% of Damage from Hits is taken from the Buff before your Life or Energy Shield
Buff can take Damage equal to 10% of your Armour, up to a maximum of 5000
Reflects 3000% of Damage taken from Buff as Fire Damage when Buff expires or is depleted
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Defiance of Destiny
explicitMods: Gain 24% of Missing Unreserved Life before being Hit by an Enemy
flavourText: The farmer was struck again and again, but he refused to stay down.
Astonished, the raiding warlord ordered the man's family spared.

name: Foe Corona
implicitMods: 7% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Fire Damage
16% of Fire Damage taken Recouped as Life
craftedMods: +1 to Level of Socketed AoE Gems

92% chance to Trigger Supported Spells when you are Stunned, or

socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Strikes enemies in front of you with a surge of flame. Burning enemies are dealt more damage. If you hit an ignited enemy, will create burning ground under them. Your damage modifiers don't apply to this burning ground.
explicitMods: 110% more Damage with Hits against Burning enemies
Hits on Ignited Enemies create Burning Ground, no more than once every 2 seconds
Burning Ground deals 25% of Fire Damage per second of Ignite affecting Enemy
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Take less Physical and Elemental Damage for a short time. Consumes up to 5 Endurance Charges to lengthen the buff and further lessen Physical Damage taken. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods: 20% increased Buff Duration per Endurance Charge removed
This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect
15.0% less Physical Damage taken per Endurance Charge removed
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Create a wall of fire for a duration, which deals burning damage to everything in its area. Each enemy that enters the wall also receives a secondary burning debuff which persists for a short duration after leaving the wall. Any projectiles fired through the wall by you and allies deal added fire damage and apply the wall's secondary debuff on hit.
socketedItems.builtInSupport: Supported by Level 1 Increased Area of Effect
explicitMods: Deals 679.9 Base Fire Damage per second
Secondary Debuff Deals 2266.4 Base Fire Damage per second
Modifiers to Spell Damage apply to this Skill's Damage Over Time effect
Maximum 4 Flame Walls at a time
Projectiles which pass through the wall deal 78 to 117 Added Fire Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff that protects the lower half of your life, preventing some of the immediate life loss when damaged by hits and applying the loss over time instead. Your life cannot be raised above low life other than by flasks, and while above low life, skills will cost life as well as mana.
explicitMods:
Life Recovery other than Flasks cannot Recover Life to above Low Life
When taking Damage from Hits, 40% of Life loss below half Life is Prevented, then 76% of Life loss prevented this way is lost over 4 seconds
Skills gain a Base Life Cost equal to 40% of Base Mana Cost while not on Low Life
